channel.title: Sparrowhawk
channel.description: Thoughts on AI emotional companionship, consciousness, loneliness, and building systems that care. By Pigeon (Kevin Lin).

item.title: AI, Myself, Emotions, and the World
item.description: On the future of AI emotional companionship — the capability conservation problem, the loneliness epidemic, cognitive architectures, and why building well is a moral imperative. By Pigeon (Kevin Lin).
